completed_tasks.name: UAT test 1 — QR load on real devices
UAT test 5 — Heartbeat + slot disconnect + reconnect
completed_tasks.progress: Ghost relay fix implemented, compiles. Not yet re-tested on device.

remaining_tasks.name: Re-run UAT test 5 with ghost relay fix deployed

human_actions_pending.action: Rebuild + redeploy server (docker compose up --build), re-run UAT test 5: background phone 65+ seconds, verify reconnect-ok across 3+ WT drops including at ~2.5min mark
human_actions_pending.context: Ghost relay fix (is_phone_client guard) implemented and compiles. Previous failure: relay-3 QUIC timeout at 2.5min with alive=true called on_client_disconnect, 60s hold timer fired 9s before phone noticed drop → invalid_token. Fix defers phone slot cleanup to heartbeat monitor (125s total grace).

decisions.decision: Relay exit skips on_client_disconnect for phone clients (is_phone_client guard in wt_server.rs + ws_server.rs); heartbeat monitor (65s miss + 60s hold = 125s total) owns phone slot cleanup
decisions.rationale: Ghost relay with alive=true calling on_client_disconnect immediately started a 60s hold timer from QUIC drop instant. Phone noticed drop 2min27sec later, reconnected 9s AFTER hold timer fired → invalid_token. Heartbeat monitor 125s grace > any realistic phone QUIC timeout scenario.

decisions.decision: heartbeatInterval cleared on both reconnect-fail paths in phone.js
decisions.rationale: Stale heartbeats after reconnect-fail flooded server logs with WARN phone-not-found (phone-state, heartbeat, rtc-channel-ready messages buffered in WS still firing after slot released)

decisions.decision: WT primary, WS auto-fallback; reconnect tries WT first then WS per iteration
decisions.rationale: preferred for games; WS reliable fallback

decisions.decision: 3s startup delay before first reconnect attempt
decisions.rationale: iOS network unstable first ~30s after backgrounding

next_action: Rebuild server: docker compose up --build. Open phone + desktop. Pair → active view. Background phone 70+ seconds. Watch phone debug log for 'reconnect-ok'. If 3+ reconnects across 5+ minutes all succeed → UAT test 5 pass. Update 04-UAT.md result=pass.
context_notes: Root cause of 3rd reconnect failure was relay-3 ghost QUIC timeout (alive=true) firing on_client_disconnect prematurely. WARNs at session end (phone-state not found) were stale heartbeats from open WS after slot released — fixed by clearing heartbeatInterval on reconnect-fail. The broker force-replace + hot reconnect (slot Connected → hot reconnect accepted) fixes from earlier sessions remain in place.
